# anthropic_compliance_organization_users (Data Source)

Lists all members of a given organization from the Compliance API. Includes SCIM-sourced users (with `external_id` populated). Enterprise + Compliance API key with scope `read:compliance_user_data`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_compliance_organization_users" "main" {
  organization_id = "org_01ABC..."
}

# Filter SCIM-sourced users
output "scim_users" {
  value = [
    for u in data.anthropic_compliance_organization_users.main.users : u
    if u.source_type == "scim"
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String)
- `email` (String)
- `external_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `last_active_at` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `role` (String)
- `source_type` (String)
- `status` (String)
